=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:15-7:21) TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.Finite` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.Finite"

[D2] (8:17-8:33) TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.FiniteFromString` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.FiniteFromString"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.Finite" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaNumber_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning

import { Schema } from "effect"

export const User = Schema.Struct({
  age: Schema.Finite,
  score: Schema.NumberFromString
})


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.FiniteFromString" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaNumber_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning

import { Schema } from "effect"

export const User = Schema.Struct({
  age: Schema.Number,
  score: Schema.FiniteFromString
})
